description_long: This is a pair of stylish sunglasses featuring a bold, full-rim rectangular frame with a glossy black finish. The lenses are dark and gradient, transitioning from a deeper shade at the top to a lighter tint at the bottom, providing both sun protection and a fashionable look. The temples are thick and straight, with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. Subtle branding is visible on both the upper corner of the right lens and the outer side of the temples, adding a touch of sophistication. The bridge is wide and gently arched, seamlessly connecting the two lenses. Overall, the design is modern and urban, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A pair of glossy black rectangular sunglasses with gradient dark lenses and bold, thick temples featuring visible branding. The design is modern and urban, ideal for stylish sun protection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular frame, gradient dark lenses, and the wide, glossy bridge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, straight temple with visible branding and the gentle curve at the end.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full width of the frame and the symmetrical, straight temples.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the matching thick temple with branding and the overall frame profile.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with bold, thick temples and a wide, gently arched bridge. The frame is solid and robust, with a modern, urban style and no additional embellishments beyond branding.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark gray gradient tint, darker at the top and lighter at the bottom, with a smooth transition and high transparency in the lighter area.
attribute_bridge_style: Wide, gently arched saddle bridge that is integrated into the frame, providing a seamless connection between the lenses.
attribute_temple_detailing: Thick, straight temples with a slight curve at the ends for comfort. Visible branding is present, and the temples are otherwise smooth and unadorned.
attribute_brand_logo: Brand logo is visible on the upper corner of the right lens and on the outer side of both temples, printed in a contrasting color.
